code:
import io

let text = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(text, "\n")
mut i = 0
let n = lines.len()
mut idx = 0
while i < n
  let line = lines.get(i)
  match line
  when Some(s)
    if i == n - 1 and string.is_empty(s)
      i = i + 1
    else
      println("[#{idx}] #{s}")
      idx = idx + 1
      i = i + 1
    end
  when None
    i = i + 1
  end
end
